pokemon:koraidon.name: Koraidon
pokemon:koraidon.summary: This seems to be the Winged King mentioned in an old expedition journal. It was said to have split the land with its bare fists.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This seems to be the Winged King mentioned in an old expedition journal. It was said to have split the land with its bare fists.
This Pokémon resembles Cyclizar, but it is far burlier and more ferocious. Nothing is known about its ecology or other features.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This seems to be the Winged King mentioned in an old expedition journal. It was said to have split the land with its bare fists.
